title: Containers
visual_description: Wooden crates, round barrels, lidded chests, shelves, and tables that may hold supplies. Their exact contents are not visible until searched.
text: Container visual profile: crates, barrels, chests, shelves, and supply tables; contents remain unknown until searched.

title: Ritual Circle
visual_description: An occult circular marking or sigil drawn on the ground, distinct from ordinary floor decoration.
text: Ritual circle visual profile: occult circular sigil marked on the floor.

title: Hazards
visual_description: Visible holes, pressure plates, suspicious floor mechanisms, spikes, or blocked collapsing passages. A blocked path is not automatically an active trap.
text: Hazard visual profile: holes, pressure plates, spikes, or mechanisms; ordinary debris and blocked passages are not automatically dangerous.
